name: Vanta
description: Vanta automates SOC 2, ISO 27001, HIPAA, GDPR, and other compliance frameworks, continuously monitoring your infrastructure and helping you pass audits faster. Popular with SaaS companies needing enterprise compliance.
cons: Can have false positives in monitoring
use_cases: You need SOC 2 Type II certification quickly to satisfy enterprise customer security questionnaires and close deals
Your team wants continuous automated monitoring across AWS, GCP, GitHub, and Okta so control failures surface before auditors do
You're managing vendor risk across your supply chain and need a centralised platform to track third-party security assessments
Your company needs to maintain multiple frameworks — SOC 2, HIPAA, ISO 27001 — and wants a single compliance programme covering all of them
